experience.title: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst
responsibilities: Analyzed healthcare data sets to derive actionable insights that enhanced patient outcomes and operational processes.
Developed complex SQL queries for data extraction and reporting, ensuring data integrity and accuracy.
Utilized Python and R for statistical analysis and predictive modeling to inform decision-making in clinical settings.
Created interactive dashboards using Tableau to visualize key performance indicators and trends for stakeholders.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement analytics solutions that improved patient care delivery.
achievements: Led a project that reduced patient readmission rates by 15% through data-driven insights.
Received 'Employee of the Month' award for outstanding contributions to data analysis and reporting.

experience.title: Healthcare Data Analyst
responsibilities: Conducted data mining and statistical analysis on large healthcare databases.
Developed and maintained data pipelines for analytical processes using SAS.
Performed data visualization using Tableau to present findings to healthcare providers and executives.
Worked with EPIC systems to extract and analyze patient data for quality improvement initiatives.
achievements: Improved reporting efficiency by 30% through automation of data aggregation processes.
